equipment.name: Aura of acquiescence
equipment.desc: Enemy units in close combat lose 1 Initiative to a minimum of 1.

equipment.name: Girdle of the Realm Racer
equipment.desc: The model gains +2" Movement and the "Anti-grav" ability.

equipment.name: Seeker of Slaanesh
equipment.desc: The model gains +6" Movement, +1 Toughness, +1 Wound, +1 Attack, additional Haste(2") and the "Bike" ability.

equipment.name: Soporific musk
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Deflect" and "Parry" ability.

equipment.name: Soulstealer
equipment.desc: Once per round, after killing at least one enemy model, the bearer regains 1 wound up to its maximum. Unique.

equipment.name: Thrill Seeker
equipment.desc: The Model and its attached unit gain +1 to all Wound rolls and suffer -1 Toughness.

equipment.name: Transfixing gaze
equipment.desc: Enemy models in close combat lose 1 Attack to a minimum of 1.
